name: dlpfc-goals
description: dlPFC goal-conditioned recall MVP (RESEARCH.md §PFC.dlPFC). When --goal <tag> is set, memories whose tags array contains the goal tag get a 1.5x score boost and results are re-sorted. Five memories share the same topic. Three are untagged 'plan note' entries with the same query-aligned phrasing as the tagged ones (so baseline BM25 ranks them similarly). Two are tagged with `auth-rewrite`. Without --goal, BM25 ties are broken by recency / index order and at least one untagged 'plan note' enters top-3, blocking the tagged pair from filling top-3 alone — top-3 is dominated by 'plan note'. With --goal auth-rewrite, the 1.5x boost lifts both tagged entries above all untagged, surfacing both markers.
remembers: auth migration plan note one for the auth migration
auth migration plan note two for the auth migration
auth migration plan note three for the auth migration

remembers.text: marker-tagged-A: auth migration step for the auth migration
marker-tagged-B: auth migration step for the auth migration
